topStories.description: The Supreme Court has ruled that OBC creamy layer status cannot be decided solely on parental income, and that treating children of PSU and private sector employees differently from government servants for reservation eligibility amounts to hostile discrimination.

topStories.title: Supreme Court grants bail to Kashmiri separatist leader Shabir Ahmed Shah in terror funding case
topStories.description: The Supreme Court has granted bail to Kashmiri separatist leader Shabir Ahmed Shah in a case related to terror funding.

topStories.title: Income can’t be sole criterion to determine OBC creamy layer: Supreme Court
topStories.description: The court said that adopting an interpretation that disadvantages one segment of the same backward class without rational justification would amount to treating “equals as unequals”

topStories.title: "Unpredictable, Unreliable": Shashi Tharoor's Donald Trump Report Card
topStories.description: Donald Trump is 'unpredictable' and 'unreliable' and there has 'never been a world leader like him, particularly at the helm of such a powerful country', a mystified Congress MP Shashi Tharoor said...

topStories.title: ‘Only way to end this war is...’ Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian reiterates key demands for truce with US
topStories.description: After launching Operation Epic Fury, the US and Israel have struggled to change Iran's leadership despite military successes. Iran insists on not seeking a ceasefire, and regional tensions rise as Gulf states push for peace amid increasing oil prices.

topStories.title: Supreme Court comes down heavily on discharging patients ‘against medical advice’
topStories.description: The Supreme Court said hospitals sometimes resort to such discharges when curative treatment is no longer possible

topStories.title: 'Saw Epic Fury & Liked It': Trump On Choosing Op Name For Strikes On Iran
topStories.description: Donald Trump claimed operation 'Epic Fury' was successful and quickly achieved its objectives.

topStories.title: Pentagon reportedly blocked photographers from US-Iran conflict briefings over ‘unflattering’ photos of Pete Hegseth
topStories.description: Photographers from the Associated Press, Reuters, and Getty Images were banned after the media houses published photos of Hegseth speaking to the media after a March 2 press conference with the chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff.

topStories.title: Parliament Budget session LIVE: Lok Sabha to discuss and vote on demands for grants under Railway Ministry
topStories.description: Congress president Mallikarjun Kharge on Wednesday demanded that Prime Minister Narendra Modi respond in Parliament to the emerging economic impact of the conflict in West Asia

topStories.title: Sensex, Nifty witness drop sharply amid oil shortage fears, Trump admin probe
topStories.description: The BSE Sensex tumbled 992.53 points to 75,871.18 in early trade, while the Nifty dived 310.55 points to 23,556.30.

topStories.title: ‘As a father, this is…’: Man after SC gives right to die nod to son Harish Rana
topStories.description: The Supreme Court's decision to allow withdrawal of son Harish Rana's medical treatment left his father Ashok feeling both pain and relief.

topStories.title: IndiGo to operate more flights to 9 Middle East nations amid US-Iran war | Check full list of flights on 12 March
topStories.description: Global air travel has remained severely disrupted after the war in Iran forced the closure of key Middle Eastern hubs, including Dubai, Doha and Abu Dhabi, stranding tens of thousands of passengers.

Trump launches a sudden tirade against Gavin Newsom, lashes out at him for being Dyslexic
dailyNews.description: Earlier in Kentucky, Trump spent a long stretch of his speech mocking Newsom for publicly talking about his dyslexia, saying, “I don’t want the president of the United States to have a cognitive deficiency.”

dailyNews.title: Dr Oz helps older woman who collapsed during Trump's speech at Kentucky event
dailyNews.description: Dr. Mehmet Oz sprang into action during President Donald Trump’s speech in Kentucky when an older woman collapsed, prompting the president to pause his remarks and call for assistance.

dailyNews.title: CNN's Abby Phillip issues on-air correction, says she takes 'full responsibility' for Mamdani flub
dailyNews.description: CNN host Abby Phillip issued an on-air correction for falsely claiming that New York City Mayor Zohran Mamdani was the target of Saturday's terrorist attack.

dailyNews.title: Italy win over Mexico sends Team USA to WBC quarterfinals
dailyNews.description: Italy defeated Mexico to advance in World Baseball Classic, while saving Team USA's tournament hopes with their crucial victory in Houston.

dailyNews.title: Giants co-owner Steve Tisch, siblings look to transfer equity stake to children’s trusts, NFL memo shows
dailyNews.description: New York Giants co-owners Steve Tisch, Laurie Tisch and Jonathan Tisch submitted a request to transfer their 23.1% stake to their children's trusts.

dailyNews.title: California State University board meeting falls into chaos amid SJSU lawsuit vs Trump admin over trans scandal
dailyNews.description: CSU and San Jose State University sued the federal government over Title IX transgender volleyball findings after Education Secretary threatened funding cuts.

dailyNews.title: Graham Platner claims voters concerned over trans athletes are 'manipulated by billionaires'
dailyNews.description: Democratic Maine Senate candidate Graham Platner suggested opposition to transgender athletes in female sports stems from an "out-of-state" billionaire agenda.

dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump introduced Jake Paul at a political rally in Hebron, Kentucky, on Wednesday, predicting the YouTuber turned boxer will one day seek political office.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration puts key Biden-era immigration policy on notice: 'Unsustainable cycle'
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is looking to undo temporary protected status designations for hundreds of thousands of migrants in the U.S., which would reverse a key Biden-era policy.

dailyNews.title: U.S. at Fault in Strike on School in Iran, Preliminary Inquiry Says
dailyNews.description: Outdated targeting data may have resulted in a mistaken missile strike, according to the ongoing military investigation, which undercuts President Trump’s assertion that Iran could be to blame.

dailyNews.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
dailyNews.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Is Using the Paxton-Cornyn Race to Squeeze the Senate Over the SAVE Act
dailyNews.description: The president has yet to make an endorsement in the contest between John Cornyn and Ken Paxton as he tries to push the Senate to pass a bill requiring voters to show identification at the polls.

dailyNews.title: Republicans Concede They Need to Pivot on Immigration Before Midterms
dailyNews.description: In public comments and private meetings at a House G.O.P. retreat, top officials allowed that President Trump’s immigration crackdown had hurt the party and that they needed a course correction on the issue.

dailyNews.title: Trump Documents Missing in Epstein Files Highlight DOJ’s Missteps
dailyNews.description: In late July, an F.B.I. agent asked colleagues to get started on a sensitive task relating to Jeffrey Epstein, listing the names of 14 prominent men, with President Trump at the top.

dailyNews.title: Trump Targets Major Trading Partners With New Investigation
dailyNews.description: A trade investigation focuses on the European Union, China, India and other countries and will likely lead to tariffs to replace those struck down by the Supreme Court.

dailyNews.title: Strong or Weak? How Trump Picks His Battles.
dailyNews.description: Despite his tough talk, President Trump has consistently made allowances for countries he sees as powerful or dominant.

dailyNews.title: Anthropic sues Trump administration over "supply chain risk" order
dailyNews.description: Anthropic sued the Defense Department and other federal agencies on Monday over the government's move to designate it a risk to the supply chain.

dailyNews.title: Trump vows to end war "soon" as Iran hits ships and threatens banks
dailyNews.description: President Trump says he'll end the war soon, when he wants to, as Iran hits ships in and near the Strait of Hormuz and warns U.S.-linked banks will be next.

dailyNews.title: Trump releasing 172 million barrels of oil from reserve as prices soar amid Iran war
dailyNews.description: President Trump ordered the release of 172 million barrels of oil from the U.S.'s Strategic Petroleum Reserve on Wednesday, after oil prices rocketed to their highest levels in years amid the U.S.'s war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: After Trump's call for Massie defeat, outside groups spending $5M to try ousting him
dailyNews.description: President Trump's scorn towards GOP Rep. Thomas Massie of Kentucky is a key factor in the May primary. He has called Massie the "worst Republican congressman" in Congress' history
